title: satureja umbrosa var. japonica
intro: Satureja umbrosa var. japonica is a variety of mountain savory, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, specifically in Japan, and is also found in other parts of the world. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja umbrosa var. japonica include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Satureja umbrosa var. japonica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking to add flavor to various dishes.
